moments.title: The Open Championship
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship is set to take place at Royal Birkdale from 16 to 19 July 2026

source.l: Royal and Ancient Golf Club of St Andrews

angles.name: Golfing greats
angles.copy: Who will be the one to watch at this year's Open Championship?

angles.name: Course preview
angles.copy: Take a look at the challenging Royal Birkdale course, set to test the world's best golfers

angles.name: Tournament history
angles.copy: The Open Championship has a rich history, with many memorable moments over the years

moments.title: Glasgow Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games are coming to Glasgow from 23 July to 2 August 2026, featuring a wide range of sports and athletes

angles.copy: Get to know the Scottish athletes competing in the Commonwealth Games

moments.title: Royal Welsh Show
moments.blurb: The Royal Welsh Show, one of the biggest agricultural shows in Europe, takes place from 20 to 23 July 2026 at Llanelwedd, Builth Wells

angles.name: Agricultural showcase
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a celebration of agriculture, food, and rural life in Wales

angles.name: Livestock and farming
angles.copy: Get up close and personal with the animals and farming equipment on display at the Royal Welsh Show

angles.name: Food and drink
angles.copy: Indulge in the best of Welsh food and drink at the Royal Welsh Show

moments.title: National Eisteddfod of Wales
moments.blurb: The National Eisteddfod of Wales, a celebration of language, music, and culture, takes place from 1 to 8 August 2026 in North Pembrokeshire

angles.name: Cultural showcase
angles.copy: The National Eisteddfod of Wales is a showcase of Welsh culture, language, and music

angles.name: Music and performance
angles.copy: Enjoy the best of Welsh music and performance at the National Eisteddfod of Wales

angles.name: Language and heritage
angles.copy: Learn about the rich language and heritage of Wales at the National Eisteddfod of Wales

moments.title: Sidmouth Folk Festival
moments.blurb: The 72nd Sidmouth Folk Festival takes place from 31 July to 7 August 2026 in the Devon seaside town

angles.name: Folk music celebration
angles.copy: The Sidmouth Folk Festival is a celebration of folk music and dance from around the world

angles.name: Artist performances
angles.copy: Catch performances by talented folk artists from the UK and beyond at the Sidmouth Folk Festival

angles.name: Workshops and sessions
angles.copy: Join in on workshops and sessions to learn new folk music and dance skills at the Sidmouth Folk Festival
